title: Thunder, Perfect Mind: I Am the First and the Last
description: A mysterious feminine divine voice proclaims herself as all opposites simultaneously.
introduction: A mysterious feminine divine voice proclaims herself as all opposites simultaneously.

translation.original_text: ⲁⲛⲟⲕ ⲧϣⲟⲣⲡ ⲁⲩⲱ ⲧϩⲁⲉ ⲁⲛⲟⲕ ⲡⲉⲧⲧⲁⲓⲏⲩ ⲁⲩⲱ ⲡⲉⲧⲥⲟϣ
translation.text: I am the first and the last. I am the honored one and the scorned one. I am the whore and the holy one. I am the wife and the virgin.
